name: holiday_1613_parameter_fit_v1
purpose: Tracked 1613 runtime intake for image-observed optimization of one shared ordinary material parameter vector.

inherited_runtime_inputs.reason: The supplied archive contains model assets but no compiled Laya runtime bundle or shader source.

known_intake_findings: The five visible skinned meshes share material UUID 8205a746-d1be-47d9-b0fd-d6ca1db55356.
The material main texture UUID f2d112e5-1b94-40ee-9eb0-2a199fe25b15 resolves to the original delivered 1024x1024 texture.
The prefab references two project scripts and eleven resources not included in the archive; the missing resources belong to optional effect renderers rather than the five visible skinned meshes.
The tracked material and texture are byte-identical to the delivered archive. No view-conditioned atlas or shader branch is part of this runtime.
Eight-view silhouette calibration froze orthographic vertical size 6.625 and camera center offset [0.0, 0.34, 0.0].
